title: Singapore's Temasek hits record portfolio value, eyes more investment in AI, infrastructure and private credit
summary_full: Over the course of its financial year, Temasek recorded a gain of S$49 billion and a 10.5% total shareholder return.
summary_public: Over the course of its financial year, Temasek recorded a gain of S$49 billion and a 10.5% total shareholder return.
